name: Sourdough Pizza Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sourdough starter, melted shortening, and salt in a bowl until well combined.
2. Gradually add flour to the mixture and knead until you have a soft dough.
3. Roll out the dough into a flat sheet on a lightly floured surface.
4. Place a small amount of oil on a baking sheet and place the rolled-out dough onto it.
5. Bake for about 5 minutes, or until golden brown. Monitor closely to prevent burning.
6. Prepare your pizza sauce and toppings as desired.
7. Assemble and bake the pizzas according to your usual method.
